nasb.text: The ships of Tarshish were the carriers for your merchandise. And you were filled and were very glorious In the heart of the seas.

esv.text: The ships of Tarshish traveled for you with your merchandise. So you were filled and heavily laden in the heart of the seas.

cnv.text: 他施的船隻運載你的商品， 你在海的中心，滿載貨物， 極其沉重。

ccb.text: “‘他施的船只替你运货， 你在海上载满沉甸甸的货物。
